verses.1: LORD, you have been favorable to your land.
verses.2: You have forgiven the iniquity of your people.
verses.3: You have taken away all your wrath.
verses.4: Turn us, God of our salvation,
verses.5: Will you be angry with us forever?
verses.7: Show us your loving kindness, LORD.
verses.8: I will hear what God, the LORD, will speak,
verses.9: Surely his salvation is near those who fear him,
verses.11: Truth springs out of the earth.
verses.12: Yes, the LORD will give that which is good.
